image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Without relativity, your GPS would drift by kilometers every day!
Context visual: GPS satellites move fast and are far from us, causing time to act differently.
Escalation visual: Special relativity says time slows down for moving objects—like satellites.
Evidence visual: Meanwhile, general relativity states gravity affects time too—satellites are further from Earth's pull.
Payoff visual: Together, these effects cause GPS clocks to gain time—up to 38 microseconds daily!
Cta visual: So next time you navigate, remember Einstein’s theories keep you on track.
